name: list-growth-designer
description: Use when the user asks to "grow my email list", "design a lead magnet / signup incentive", "set up double opt-in", or "plan a referral / recommendation loop"; produces a list-growth plan — acquisition channels, lead-magnet / incentive concepts, a compliant double-opt-in capture-flow spec, referral-loop mechanics, and subscriber-growth / cost-per-opt-in targets (labeled Estimated) — that feeds SEND-S (consent quality captured at acquisition) and SEND-N (lifecycle entry). Not for the signup page/p
author: aaron-he-zhu
